building_cutaway.description: Pure HTML + Tailwind grid. 6 floors, 2-3 rooms per floor.

progress_ring.description: Framer Motion SVG ring in Active Tracking Mode.
progress_ring.styles: Stroke color #39FF14, Track color #00E5FF/20, glowing drop shadow on stroke.

mascot_volt.description: Fixed bottom-right robotic AI assistant (Lucide 'Bot' icon). Provides voice/text feedback.
mascot_volt.styles: bg-[#111111] border border-[#00E5FF] text-[#00E5FF] p-4 flex items-center gap-4 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.2)]

forms_and_inputs.styles: bg-transparent border-b border-[#00E5FF]/50 focus:border-[#39FF14] focus:ring-0 rounded-none text-white outline-none

styles.primary: bg-[#39FF14] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#39FF14]/80 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_#39FF14] transition-all
styles.secondary: border border-[#00E5FF] text-[#00E5FF] bg-transparent hover:bg-[#00E5FF]/10 transition-all uppercase

pages_views.name: Welcome Screen
pages_views.features: Hero view, 'ENTER HQ' button, cyberpunk city bg image overlaid with #050505/80 to ensure text readability.

pages_views.name: Planning Mode
pages_views.features: Left col-span-4 (2D Cutaway Skyscraper with 6 floors), Right col-span-6 (Command Center with Master Blueprint accordions and Custom Quest Engine forms).

pages_views.name: Active Tracking Mode
pages_views.features: Minimalist dark protocol view. Huge central progress ring, streak counter, buffer day badges, and daily/weekly task lists. Clean, focused.

pages_views.name: HQ Visit Mode
pages_views.features: Full-screen building view with glowing active rooms. 'Return to Protocol' button. Building admiration focus.

motion_accessibility.mascot_animation: Framer Motion: y: [-5, 5] infinite loop duration 2s ease-in-out.
motion_accessibility.page_transitions: Framer Motion: initial opacity 0, scale 0.98. animate opacity 1, scale 1.
motion_accessibility.celebration: react-confetti triggered on perfect week / weekly mission submission.
motion_accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., 'enter-hq-button', 'room-quest-form', 'nav-planning-mode').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and import 'Orbitron' and 'Space Mono' from Google Fonts in index.html or global CSS.
Implement the strict color palette EXACTLY as specified: background #050505, surface #111111, primary #39FF14, wireframe #00E5FF.
Do not use generic 'Inter' font or rounded soft UI (no rounded-full or heavy radius). Keep borders sharp or max 2px rounded. This is a retro-futuristic terminal command center.
The 2D Skyscraper must visually represent a cutaway building (like Fallout Shelter) with electric blue structural wireframes. Rooms light up neon green when quests inside are active.
Use Framer Motion for the progress ring in Tracking Mode and the floating animation of Volt.
Volt Mascot must be implemented as a fixed or absolutely positioned element on the bottom-right, acting as an AI assistant providing feedback.
Implement the logic for EP (max 20), XP, level system (Civilian -> Sidekick -> Hero -> Legend), and base upkeep tax.
Ensure all state is persisted to localStorage.
You MUST add data-testid attributes to all buttons, form inputs, toggles, and critical UI elements for automated testing.
